title: Vendor in latest containers/image
body:
Adds feature to pull compressed docker-archive files

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM and happy green test buttons.

:pushpin: Commit 738bf4e has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 738bf4e32f7816f5dd5b568959737c770cdcec93 -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
@umohnani8 Could you give us a use case where this is important?

@rhatdan Actually I don't think buildah pulls images saved to docker-archive or oci-archive. It would be cool to add this though so we can do "buildah from docker-archive:alp.tar" and it will create a container from the image in alp.tar. And buildah push supports all the various transports.
